settings_page_desc: Adjust appearance, language, and browser preferences from one place so the panel fits the way you work.
settings_theme_light_desc: Always use the light interface, ideal for bright environments.
settings_theme_dark_desc: Always use the dark interface, ideal for low-light work.
settings_theme_system_desc: Automatically follow the system appearance between light and dark.
settings_color_desc: Change the accent color used across the frontend panel.
settings_browser_list_desc: Higher information density for browsing file details quickly.
settings_browser_grid_desc: A more visual layout for scanning content at a glance.
settings_browser_open_single_click_desc: Open files or folders immediately with one click for faster browsing.
settings_browser_open_double_click_desc: Use one click to select and a double click to open, closer to desktop file managers.
settings_storage_event_stream_enabled_de: File and folder changes refresh the current view through a live push connection.
settings_storage_event_stream_disabled_d: When disabled, no live push connection is opened and lists update only after manual actions or refreshes.
settings_language_desc: Choose the display language for settings and the file interface.
settings_display_time_zone_browser_desc: Use the current browser or system timezone {{timezone}} for absolute timestamps.
settings_display_time_zone_explicit_desc: Use {{timezone}} for absolute timestamps and time-based stats.
settings_profile_desc: Manage how your account appears across the panel.
settings_interface_desc: Adjust the overall look and feel of the panel.
settings_current_setup_desc: A quick summary of the display and browsing choices that are active now.
settings_display_name_desc: Set the name shown across the panel without changing your login username.
settings_display_name_hint: Your login username stays @{{username}}. Leave it empty to fall back to the username.
settings_username_readonly_hint: Username is used for sign-in and cannot be changed.
settings_email_readonly_hint: Email is shown here for reference and cannot be changed here yet.
settings_avatar_none_desc: No custom avatar is configured yet.
settings_avatar_gravatar_desc: Use the Gravatar image derived from your email address.
settings_avatar_upload_desc: Use an uploaded avatar optimized for the panel.
settings_avatar_crop_desc: Move the crop box, resize it from the edges, and watch the live preview update on the left.
settings_avatar_crop_output_hint: Exports a square avatar up to {{size}}.
settings_avatar_crop_hint: The image keeps its original aspect ratio and is not dragged or stretched. Only the circular crop box changes position and size.
settings_security_desc: Manage your sign-in password and review how this browser session behaves after the change.
settings_email_section_desc: Review the current email state and send a confirmation link for an email change.
settings_email_status_verified_desc: This email is verified and can be used for sign-in and security notifications.
settings_email_status_unverified_desc: This email is not verified yet, so some sensitive actions stay blocked.
settings_email_pending_desc: {{email}} is waiting for confirmation. It replaces the current email only after verification.
settings_email_change_hint: A confirmation link is sent to the new address. The change takes effect only after it is confirmed.
settings_email_change_requires_verified: The current account email must be verified before it can be changed.
settings_email_change_requested: Confirmation email sent to the new address.
settings_email_change_confirmed_login_hi: Email changed to {{email}}. Sign in with the new address.
settings_email_change_same: The new email must be different from the current one.
settings_email_summary_verified: {{email}} is verified and ready for sign-in and security notifications.
settings_email_summary_unverified: {{email}} is still unverified, so sensitive actions stay restricted.
settings_password_section_desc: Confirm your current password before saving a new one for this account.
settings_password_confirm_mismatch: The confirmation password does not match.
settings_passkeys_section_desc: Sign in with device unlock, biometrics, or a security key instead of typing your password.
settings_passkeys_name_placeholder: For example: MacBook, iPhone, or security key
settings_passkeys_add_hint: Your browser opens the system passkey prompt when you add one.
settings_passkeys_empty_desc: After adding a passkey, you can sign in from the login page using device unlock.
settings_passkeys_delete_desc: After deletion, this device or security key can no longer sign in to this account.
settings_security_account_desc: This updates the local sign-in password for @{{username}}.
settings_security_session_desc: Your current browser session stays signed in for now after the password change.
settings_sessions_section_desc: This lists devices that are still signed in. After removal, that device can remain signed in until its current session expires.
settings_sessions_empty_desc: There are no device sessions to show for this account right now.
settings_teams_desc: Review your current memberships and manage team members inside the teams you belong to.
settings_teams_empty_desc: A system admin needs to create a team and add you before it appears here.
settings_team_create_desc: Create a new team workspace for your account.
settings_team_dialog_hint: Team details and member permissions take effect immediately after saving.
settings_team_details_desc: Review the current team profile, storage usage, and member permissions.
settings_team_archive_desc: The team will be archived and removed from your active workspace list.
settings_archived_teams_desc: Archived teams stay here until a team admin restores them or the retention window expires.
settings_team_members_desc: Add teammates, change their role, or remove access when needed.
settings_team_member_search_placeholder: Search members by username, email, or ID...
settings_team_member_filtered_empty_desc: Try another keyword or adjust the filters.
settings_team_member_identifier_desc: Enter an existing user's username or email address.
settings_team_remove_member_desc: This removes the selected user from the team workspace.
settings_team_no_members_desc: Add a teammate by username or email to start collaborating.
settings_team_audit_desc: Review profile changes, member updates, and archive activity for this team.
settings_team_audit_empty_desc: Team management events will appear here in reverse chronological order.
settings_team_danger_zone_desc: Keep high-risk actions here so the impact stays obvious before execution.
settings_team_danger_zone_hint: Confirm another manager is still available and notify members before archiving the team.
settings_team_archive_confirm_label: Type the team name to confirm archiving
settings_quick_actions_desc: Jump to the most common appearance and browsing preferences.
